stemHtml:
Refer to figure or AMSTERDAM - Chart 10-2B from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
You are flying from the waypoint MOLIX to SUGOL, with 330 kt TAS, 180°/25 kt wind, fuel flow 1800 kg/h. Your actual fuel over MOLIX is 3000 kg. ATC asks you to hold over SUGOL for 20 minutes. What is your fuel remaining after the holding?
